name: Ján Sáreník
cooked: Alt Signet Faucet works and is now ready for Cluster Mempool’s limit of 64 ancestors. Not used yet but ready. Running on Bitcoin Core 31.0rc2 at the moment and enforcing the legacy limit of 25 ancestors until signet blocks are mined on a Cluster Mempool-high-limit node.
